title: Keflavik, Reykjanes — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Keflavik, Reykjanes: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Keflavik is a city in Reykjanes with a population of 16,000. Iceland’s international gateway city, home to Keflavik Airport and a growing community of remote workers.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
